requirement_topic.en: NCA Mandatory Type Approval — Radio / Telecom Terminal Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: NCA强制型式认可——无线电/电信终端设备
requirement_topic.zht: NCA強制型式認可——無線電/電信終端設備

summary.en: All radio and telecommunications terminal equipment placed on the Ghanaian market must hold a valid NCA type approval certificate issued by the National Communications Authority under the Electronic Communications Act 2008 (Act 775). The NCA approval sticker and certificate number must appear on the product or its packaging. CE and FCC marks are not recognised by NCA as equivalent. Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, and IoT devices with radio functionality are all in scope.
summary.zh: 所有投放加纳市场的无线电及电信终端设备，须持有依据《2008年电子通信法》（第775号法案）由国家通信管理局（NCA）颁发的有效型式认可证书。产品或其包装上须显示NCA认可贴纸及证书编号。NCA不承认CE和FCC标志作为等效认可。Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝及具有无线电功能的物联网设备均在适用范围内。
summary.zht: 所有投放加納市場的無線電及電信終端設備，須持有依據《2008年電子通訊法》（第775號法案）由國家通訊管理局（NCA）頒發的有效型式認可證書。產品或其包裝上須顯示NCA認可貼紙及證書編號。NCA不承認CE和FCC標誌作為等效認可。Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩及具有無線電功能的物聯網裝置均在適用範圍內。

standards_or_laws: NCA Type Approval Certificate (product sticker + certificate number required)

summary.en: Chinese wireless devices typically hold SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) radio type approval from MIIT, a MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) for terminal equipment, and CCC certification for RF components in scope under GB standards. These Chinese approvals have no mutual recognition with NCA Ghana.
summary.zh: 中国无线设备通常持有工业和信息化部（MIIT）颁发的SRRC无线电型式核准、电信终端设备的MIIT网络接入许可（NAL）以及适用GB标准范围内射频组件的CCC认证。上述中国认可与加纳NCA之间不存在相互承认协议。
summary.zht: 中國無線設備通常持有工業和資訊化部（MIIT）頒發的SRRC無線電型式核准、電信終端設備的MIIT網路接入許可（NAL）以及適用GB標準範圍內射頻組件的CCC認證。上述中國認可與加納NCA之間不存在相互承認協議。

standards_or_laws: MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) for terminal equipment
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) for in-scope RF components

gap.en: Full gap: Chinese SRRC, NAL, and CCC approvals are not recognised by NCA. A separate NCA type approval application must be submitted in Ghana. The NCA sticker and certificate number must appear on all units. There is no ECOWAS mutual recognition arrangement that bridges this gap for wireless equipment.
gap.zh: 完全差距：中国的SRRC、NAL及CCC认可均不被NCA承认。须在加纳单独提交NCA型式认可申请。所有产品须显示NCA贴纸及证书编号。目前不存在可弥补无线设备领域差距的ECOWAS相互承认安排。
gap.zht: 完全差距：中國的SRRC、NAL及CCC認可均不被NCA承認。須在加納單獨提交NCA型式認可申請。所有產品須顯示NCA貼紙及證書編號。目前不存在可彌補無線設備領域差距的ECOWAS相互承認安排。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese SRRC / NAL / CCC approvals do not satisfy Ghana NCA type approval. A separate NCA type approval must be obtained before placing wireless or telecom terminal equipment on the Ghanaian market.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国SRRC / NAL / CCC认可不满足加纳NCA型式认可要求。在将无线或电信终端设备投放加纳市场前，须单独取得NCA型式认可。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國SRRC / NAL / CCC認可不滿足加納NCA型式認可要求。在將無線或電信終端設備投放加納市場前，須單獨取得NCA型式認可。
